rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF LORETTA ASH
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. The conservator must have sent a copy of the corrected Order Appointing Probate Conservator and an information notice about Loretta's rights (Form GC-341) to the conservatee, her attorney, and her relatives. Appointing Probate Conservator plus an information notice of the rights of conservatee [Form GC-341] must be attached to the order. Page 2 of GC-341 must be completed to file the form. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PETER ZIDAN KWAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/12/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) The I&A filed on 1/12/23 (not 11/8/21) showed cash on hand totaling $204,635.00, not $204,634.90. (2) When did Glen Douglas Lee die? Was he not survived by issue? (3) Are the issue of Manuel Kwan all adults? Is Kevin Z. Kwan an adult? (The chart of beneficiaries in paragraph 19 clearly identifies certain individuals as adults, but not these.) (4) Why was notice mailed to Collin Zidan Kwan in care of Kevin Z. Kwan? [CRC 7.51(a).] (5) If Stuart L. Chan has not yet been appointed as executor, notice to him is not sufficient. (6) In addition to the $15,000 retainer to the landlord tenant attorney, the attorney for this personal representative also advanced him $300. (7) Why was it necessary to file two ex parte petitions (on 8/10/21 and 9/28/21) to hire and retain landlord-tenant counsel? (8) Prob. C. Sect. 9202(b) also requires notice if an heir or beneficiary HAS PREVIOUSLY BEEN confined in a prison or facility under the jurisdiction of the Department of Corrections, etc. (9) Paragraph 18 of the petition appears to be incomplete and/or incorrect. Were there personal property taxes payable by the estate? (10) "Miscellaneous" is not an appropriate source for a receipt. Was the administrator with will annexed unable to determine what the source of the $251.55 in refunds received on 7/15/21 was? (11) The $39,438.99 balance in Wells Fargo was for 1/18/23, not 1/31/23. A statement verifying the balance of cash on hand at the end of an accounting period should encompass, not precede, the ending date of the accounting period. (12) If copies or printouts of bank statements are filed (attached to an e-filed petition), the fiduciary must verify their originality. [CRC 7.575(b) for computer-generated printouts.] Please provide a proposed order and courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 10/29/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B. (Item 4 of an I&A should NOT be completed when a probate referee HAS BEEN appointed. The will was dated 11/10/1997, NOT 11/26/1997. Transfer of cash to a different bank is not a change in the FORM of assets; cash is cash.)

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PRISCILLA MARQUEZ CRISOSTOMO
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing, although the petition did not fully comply with the disclosure required by Probate Code Section 9202( b) (notice is required if an heir or beneficiary is or WAS PREVIOUSLY confined, etc.), and the petition was reportedly verified in Daly City by the adminiatrator who lives in San Francisco and in San Francisco by the administrator who lives in Daly City. The cost to amend the Duties and Liabilities was incurred because Counsel failed to include the telephone numbers on the first version. NB: Item 4 of an I&A should NOT be completed when a Probate Referee HAS BEEN appointed. Except for exhibits, each paper filed with the court must bear a footer in the bottom margin of each page, placed below the page number and divided from the rest of the document page by a printed line. [CRC 2.110(a).]

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DAVID M. YAJKO LIVING TRUST DATED DECEMBER TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 11/12/25. (No earlier availability.) Issue(s) necessitating continuance: (1) How is this the proper venue, when the trustee resides in Texas? (2) Heirs who are not trust beneficiaries must be personally served notice or must waive notice. [Prob. C. Sect. 17203(b).] (3) What does it mean that Maureen Yajko is the sole surviving heir-at-law of predeceased siblings? Were the predeceased siblings not survived by issue? (The issue of the petitioner, the settlor's sole surviving sibling, are not required to be served notice.) (4) If there is no statement available for the Vanguard account xx7653, how does the petitioner know this is/was the settlor's account? A pleading form of proof of service attached to the document for which notice is required is NOT sufficient for a Probate petition. The only proper form of notice is the mandatory Judicial Council form Notice of Hearing, on the reverse side of which is the proof of service that should be completed. Also, notice is defective if mailed before the pleading requiring notice is e-filed. [LRSF 14.14 A.] Please provide courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues to the assigned examiner by 10/29/25. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.
